meta.title: Shadowbound Guild
meta.theme: A dark fantasy guild-management story about a plague-ravaged empire where the city survives by sending mercenaries into shadow-cursed districts.
meta.hero_fantasy: A scrappy roster of shielded warriors, swift shadow hunters, and luck-favored wardens who survive by grit, speed, and dark bargains.
meta.resource_fantasy: Earn gold from contracts, harvest shadow essence from corrupted foes, and mine iron ore to keep the guild equipped and expanding.

resources.label: Gold
resources.notes: Primary currency for contracts, buildings, and recruits.

resources.label: Iron Ore
resources.notes: Mined from the northern claims and forged into standard gear.

resources.label: Shadow Essence
resources.notes: Harvested from shadow beasts and used for cursed relics.

hero_classes.label: Warrior
hero_classes.description: Frontline shieldbearers who hold the line against corruption.

hero_classes.label: Shadow Hunter
hero_classes.description: Fast, fragile hunters who strike from the dark before enemies can react.

hero_classes.label: Warden
hero_classes.description: Occult support fighters who steady the roster and coax better spoils from the shadowlands.

acts.label: The Outskirts
acts.narrative: The city's walls no longer hold back the plague-tainted wilds. The guild takes its first contracts into the ruined outskirts, where bandits and shadow beasts pick at the weak.

zones.label: Outskirts Road
zones.loot_theme: coin purses, iron scraps, and low-grade supplies from ambushes and wrecked carts.
zones.notes: Patrols and collapsed wagons mark the first safe path beyond the gate.

zones.label: Bandit Hideout
zones.loot_theme: bandit gear, iron ore, and crude weapons.
zones.notes: Bandits prey on anyone crossing the old trade roads.

zones.label: Shadow Hound
zones.loot_theme: rare iron weapons, plague-scarred armor, and a guaranteed named hound trophy.

acts.label: The Undercity
acts.narrative: Below the city lie drowned districts, abandoned vaults, and the whispers of a dead library. The guild descends into the undercity to sever the plague's source before it reaches the surface.

zones.label: Flooded Sewers
zones.loot_theme: shadow essence, moldy salvage, and sewer-fouled trinkets.
zones.notes: The water is black with rot and things that move under it.

zones.label: Abandoned District
zones.loot_theme: shadow essence, rare charms, and relic scraps.
zones.notes: The streets are empty except for husks and whispering windows.

zones.label: Cult Catacombs
zones.loot_theme: shadow essence, occult charms, and forbidden records.
zones.notes: The cult keeps the undercity fed on fear and sacrifice.

zones.label: The Pale Archivist
zones.loot_theme: named relics, rare occult gear, and guaranteed boss treasure.

buildings.label: Guildhall
buildings.description: The guild's public face, where contracts are signed and the roster is raised.
buildings.notes: Primary hub and early gold engine.

buildings.label: Forge
buildings.description: A soot-choked workshop where iron gear is hammered and fitted.
buildings.notes: Turns iron ore into dependable weapons and armor.

buildings.label: Shadow Vault
buildings.description: A hidden chamber that distills shadow essence from captured corruption.
buildings.notes: Unlocks in act 2 and slowly feeds the cursed economy.

items.label: Iron Sword
items.notes: Standard issue blade for the outskirts.

items.label: Plague Mail
items.notes: Corroded armor hardened by plague residue.

items.label: Iron Ore
items.notes: Basic forge fuel for dependable gear.

items.label: Shadow Amulet
items.notes: A charm that helps the guild read the dark.

items.label: Shadow Essence
items.notes: Raw corruption used for cursed crafting.

items.label: Void Relic
items.notes: A unique boss relic pulled from the undercity's deepest vault.
